text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Satono Diamond has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
You've been quite busy lately, haven't you,
Trainer?
choice_data_list:
Sorry about that. Did you need me for
something?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
No, the opposite actually. I wanted to ask you to
take a break. You've been overworking yourself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Don't be so stubborn! You don't look fine at all!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wait, that's right! The hot spring vacation!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Remember the coupon we won for a hot spring
vacation? We should go!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
We promised to show appreciation for each
other, so let's go! What do you say?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond calls the inn and makes a
reservation then and there. Before I realize it,
we're standing in front of our lodgings.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: How lucky that there was a room available for us!
choice_data_list:
I can't believe we're here... It's like we were just
at the academy...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, this isn't your average day! Take your mind
off work for a little while!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm anxious about my work, but since Satono
Diamond went out of her way to take me here, I
decide to enjoy myself to the fullest.
choice_data_list: You're right. Let's take it easy.
You're right. Let's take it easy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Let's hurry into the hot spring and wash away our
stress! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Aaah! The water felt great.
choice_data_list: My body feels so much lighter!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: See? I knew you were tired.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Would you like a shoulder massage?
choice_data_list:
I'm good, thanks! I'm feeling nice and relaxed
now.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't think of what I can do to thank you for
everything you've done for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This must be because we promised to be more
thankful toward each other. I'm touched by her
sincerity.
choice_data_list: How about we go for a stroll tomorrow?
How about we go for a stroll tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
According to the inn's information pamphlet,
there's a stream in the mountains behind our
lodging.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Great idea! That sounds nice and refreshing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We find the stream after descending some steps
near the inn. The susurration of the flowing water
is soothing and pleasant.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: The water is so nice and cool.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I wonder if there are any fish...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond looks deeply curious as she
leans over to peer into the river, before dipping
her hand in.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, look! There's a suspension bridge over there!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Let's go take a look!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Wow... This looks pretty scary.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond places one foot on the rickety
suspension bridge.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I won't go far. I'll just take a few steps and come
back.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can stop her, she nimbly skips on to the
bridge and stops halfway across.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The view is incredible!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I got a beautiful shot! Hehe. ♪

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Take a look, Trainer. The view from the bridge is
amazing!
choice_data_list: It is. But that was really reckless of you.
It is. But that was really reckless of you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry... I just feel so at ease with you watching
over me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I once crossed a suspension bridge with Kita when
we were young.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita went on the bridge first, and I followed after.
Seeing her walking in front of me made me feel
safe.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I suppose I feel the same now as I did then. When
you're with me, I feel so safe that I don't pay
attention to my surroundings properly.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
That goes for earlier on the bridge, and during
races too...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Still, that's no excuse for my irresponsible
behavior. I'll be careful from now on!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huh?
choice_data_list:
I'll be here for you, so just run without worrying
about anything.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
You can't make history without jumping head first
into a little trouble. If she ever really overexerts
herself, then I'll step in.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All I want is for her to follow her heart, and keep
her eyes on the prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After all, that is what makes her Satono Diamond.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I'm glad to hear that. Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm counting on you to watch over me from here
on out!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Don't take your eyes off me, even for a second! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I sense that Satono Diamond and I have formed
an irreplaceable bond during this time together.
